title: What Happens When Two Stars Collide?
description:
When two enormous stars in space collide, something wild happens here on Earth… 

At first, we don’t feel it! But Einstein predicted that massive things warp space and time around them. That’s what we call gravity. 

So when these stars collide, they create an explosion of light and ripples in space and time that move outward like a wave... a "gravitational wave." 

Scientists built a giant measuring stick to measure these waves and now… they’re finding something bigger… to see what, subscribe and watch our longer video!  

#ligo  #gravity #space #star #earth #science #shorts
